mapper.select: WITH ISSUE_SUMMARY AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_ISSUE_COUNT, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN I.STATUS IN ('DONE', 'CLOSED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS DONE_ISSUE_COUNT, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN I.STATUS NOT IN ('DONE', 'CLOSED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS REMAINING_ISSUE_COUNT, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(I.ESTIMATED_MINUTES, 0)), 0) AS TOTAL_ESTIMATED_MINUTES, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN I.STATUS IN ('DONE', 'CLOSED') THEN COALESCE(I.ESTIMATED_MINUTES, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS DONE_ESTIMATED_MINUTES, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN I.STATUS NOT IN ('DONE', 'CLOSED') THEN COALESCE(I.ESTIMATED_MINUTES, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS REMAINING_ESTIMATED_MINUTES FROM SPRINT_ISSUE SI INNER JOIN ISSUE I ON SI.ISSUE_ID = I.ISSUE_ID WHERE SI.SPRINT_ID = #{sprintId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler} ), SPENT_SUMMARY AS ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(WL.SPENT_MINUTES), 0) AS SPENT_MINUTES FROM SPRINT_ISSUE SI INNER JOIN WORK_LOG WL ON SI.ISSUE_ID = WL.ISSUE_ID WHERE SI.SPRINT_ID = #{sprintId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler} AND WL.WORK_DATE <= #{snapshotDate} ) SELECT NULL AS SNAPSHOT_ID, S.SPRINT_ID, #{snapshotDate} AS SNAPSHOT_DATE, ISSUE_SUMMARY.TOTAL_ISSUE_COUNT, ISSUE_SUMMARY.DONE_ISSUE_COUNT, ISSUE_SUMMARY.REMAINING_ISSUE_COUNT, ISSUE_SUMMARY.TOTAL_ESTIMATED_MINUTES, ISSUE_SUMMARY.DONE_ESTIMATED_MINUTES, ISSUE_SUMMARY.REMAINING_ESTIMATED_MINUTES, SPENT_SUMMARY.SPENT_MINUTES, NULL AS CREATED_AT FROM SPRINT S CROSS JOIN ISSUE_SUMMARY CROSS JOIN SPENT_SUMMARY WHERE S.SPRINT_ID = #{sprintId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SPRINT_DAILY_SNAPSHOT ( SNAPSHOT_ID, SPRINT_ID, SNAPSHOT_DATE, TOTAL_ISSUE_COUNT, DONE_ISSUE_COUNT, REMAINING_ISSUE_COUNT, TOTAL_ESTIMATED_MINUTES, DONE_ESTIMATED_MINUTES, REMAINING_ESTIMATED_MINUTES, SPENT_MINUTES, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{snapshotId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}, #{sprintId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}, #{snapshotDate}, #{totalIssueCount}, #{doneIssueCount}, #{remainingIssueCount}, #{totalEstimatedMinutes}, #{doneEstimatedMinutes}, #{remainingEstimatedMinutes}, #{spentMinutes}, #{createdAt} ) ON CONFLICT (SPRINT_ID, SNAPSHOT_DATE) DO UPDATE SET TOTAL_ISSUE_COUNT = EXCLUDED.TOTAL_ISSUE_COUNT, DONE_ISSUE_COUNT = EXCLUDED.DONE_ISSUE_COUNT, REMAINING_ISSUE_COUNT = EXCLUDED.REMAINING_ISSUE_COUNT, TOTAL_ESTIMATED_MINUTES = EXCLUDED.TOTAL_ESTIMATED_MINUTES, DONE_ESTIMATED_MINUTES = EXCLUDED.DONE_ESTIMATED_MINUTES, REMAINING_ESTIMATED_MINUTES = EXCLUDED.REMAINING_ESTIMATED_MINUTES, SPENT_MINUTES = EXCLUDED.SPENT_MINUTES, CREATED_AT = EXCLUDED.CREATED_AT
mapper.select: SELECT SNAPSHOT_ID, SPRINT_ID, SNAPSHOT_DATE, TOTAL_ISSUE_COUNT, DONE_ISSUE_COUNT, REMAINING_ISSUE_COUNT, TOTAL_ESTIMATED_MINUTES, DONE_ESTIMATED_MINUTES, REMAINING_ESTIMATED_MINUTES, SPENT_MINUTES, CREATED_AT FROM SPRINT_DAILY_SNAPSHOT WHERE SPRINT_ID = #{_parameter,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler} ORDER BY SNAPSHOT_DATE ASC
